market_context: X sentiment shows cautious optimism on tech recovery but worry over 4.70% yields pressuring growth stocks, with futures flat to slightly up pre-market. No major catalysts today beyond ongoing earnings season; VIX at 18.89 signals contained volatility.

predictions.reasoning: Pre-market futures indicate mild buying interest after yesterday's -1.7% drop; X chatter from @zerohedge and @CNBC highlights dip-buying in indices despite yield concerns.
High 10Y yield at 4.70% likely to weigh on mega-cap tech; recent X posts note options flow favoring QQQ puts amid valuation fears.
AI-related sentiment on X remains bullish with mentions of new partnerships; stock has support after recent pullback from higher levels.
Short interest signals and X volume on delivery concerns point to continued pressure; no positive catalysts evident in pre-market data.
